title: Fantasy football — 2023 sleepers + league roster
html:
Fantasy football — 2023 sleepers + league roster

Source: 2023-07-31 Apple Note. Pre-draft sleeper list (4 NFL names) + 11-name league roster. Adds a 2023 data point to the fantasy football trilogy arc and surfaces the OSU-era friend network.

TL;DR

  • 2023 sleepers drafted in: Bijan Robinson (ATL RB), Quentin Johnston (LAC WR), Jahmyr Gibbs (DET RB), Garrett Wilson (NYJ WR) — three rookies + one second-year.
  • League roster (11 players): Ayden, Owen, Like, Rikey, Yerm, Kyle, Yahir, Henry, Burh, Dinsdale, Jayce — the Grants Pass / OSU-orbit fantasy crew.
  • Pairs with the May 2024 sleepers note (Walker, Breeze, Worthy, Cupp) and the 2024 league note for the fantasy football trilogy arc.
  • Worth noting: he plays in the same league across years with mostly the same 11 — durable male-friend ritual.

Pattern

Fantasy football functions in his life as a calendar peg — the annual draft is the friend-network's heartbeat. The same names show up in 2024 league rosters; some of these (Yerm, Burh, Dinsdale) are likely friend-of-friends he only sees during the season.

Open questions

  • Who is "Like"? Nickname or transcription error?
  • Did the 2023 sleepers actually pop? (Bijan + Gibbs yes; Johnston bust; Wilson stagnant.)
